title: Lei Shuo's Blog
subTitle: Welcome to my personal blog
style: <style>/* 1. 流动渐变背景 */ @keyframes gradientBG { 0% {background-position: 0% 50%;} 50% {background-position: 100% 50%;} 100% {background-position: 0% 50%;} } body { background: linear-gradient(-45deg, #ee7752, #e73c7e, #23a6d5, #23d5ab) !important; background-size: 400% 400% !important; animation: gradientBG 15s ease infinite !important; background-attachment: fixed !important; font-family: -apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,'Segoe UI',Roboto,Helvetica,Arial,sans-serif; } /* 2. 文章页磨砂玻璃 */ .markdown-body { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 12px; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px 0 rgba(31, 38, 135, 0.37); padding: 30px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.18); min-height: 80vh; } /* 3. 主页磨砂玻璃适配 */ .avatar { border-radius: 50%; border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.5); } .side { background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6) !important; backdrop-filter: blur(5px); border-radius: 10px; padding: 10px; margin-bottom: 20px; } /* 4. 透明化原有元素 */ .Header, .footer { background: transparent !important; border: none !important; } /* 5. 左侧目录样式 */ .side-nav { position: fixed; left: 20px; top: 40px; bottom: 40px; width: 220px; padding: 15px; overflow-y: auto; background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px); border-radius: 10px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.3); box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); z-index: 9999; } .side-nav-group-title { font-weight: bold; font-size: 15px; color: #333; margin: 15px 0 8px 5px; border-bottom: 2px solid #e73c7e; display: inline-block; } .side-nav a { display: block; text-decoration: none; color: #555; font-size: 14px; padding: 8px 10px; margin-bottom: 5px; border-radius: 6px; transition: 0.2s; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; } .side-nav a:hover { background: linear-gradient(90deg, #e73c7e, #ee7752); color: white; transform: translateX(5px); } /* 响应式调整 */ @media (min-width: 1000px) { .markdown-body { margin-left: 260px; max-width: calc(100% - 280px); } } @media (max-width: 999px) { .side-nav { display: none; } .markdown-body { width: 100%; } }</style>
script: <script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() { console.log('Init Custom Script'); /* 适配User Page的路径逻辑 */ const blogBaseUrl = '/blogBase.json'; fetch(blogBaseUrl).then(res => res.json()).then(data => { console.log('Data Success', data); const nav = document.createElement('div'); nav.className = 'side-nav'; const titleMain = document.createElement('div'); titleMain.style.fontSize='18px'; titleMain.style.fontWeight='bold'; titleMain.style.marginBottom='15px'; titleMain.style.textAlign='center'; titleMain.innerText='📚 导航'; nav.appendChild(titleMain); const posts = Object.values(data); const groups = {}; posts.forEach(post => { const label = post.labels[0] || '未分类'; if (!groups[label]) groups[label] = []; groups[label].push(post); }); Object.keys(groups).sort().forEach(label => { const title = document.createElement('div'); title.className = 'side-nav-group-title'; title.innerText = label; nav.appendChild(title); groups[label].forEach(item => { const link = document.createElement('a'); link.href = item.postUrl; link.innerText = item.postTitle; link.title = item.postTitle; nav.appendChild(link); }); }); document.body.appendChild(nav); }).catch(err => console.error('Error:', err)); });</script>
